title: CCPA fines two coaching institutes for misleading ads about JEE, NEET results
description: The Central Consumer Protection Authority (CCPA) recently fined two coaching institutes, Motion Education and Career Line Coaching (CLC), Sikar, for publishing misleading advertisements relating to IIT-JEE and NEET results.The authority noted that over 11 lakh students take IIT-JEE and 15–20 lakh appear for NEET annually, and many rely on coaching institute advertisements while making career decisions."In view of the wide reach and impact of the impugned advertisements, the CCPA is of the opinio
